ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the group (e.g., age range, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the group's information */,
  "location" TEXT /* More specific location information (e.g., city, country) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the participants in the group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of genders in the group */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_clips" (
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio clip */,
  "clip_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio clip */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio clip in seconds */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the audio clip (e.g., music, podcast, advertisement) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the audio clip was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the audio clip's information */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the audio file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audio clip */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer or creator of the audio clip */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the audio clip was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotional_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotional response */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group that provided the response */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio clip that elicited the response */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence (pleasantness) of the response */,
  "arousal" REAL /* Arousal (intensity) of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the response */,
  "response_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the response */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the valence and arousal values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_responses_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES audio_clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_responses_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group that the user has access to */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio clip that the user has access to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the data */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the access control entry */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES audio_clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)
